decisions.title_en: US clears H200 chip sales to ~10 China firms during Trump-Xi summit
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Distinct concrete export-license decision from the broader Trump-Xi summit story. Names 10 Chinese firms (Alibaba, Tencent, ByteDance, JD.com) each cleared for up to 75,000 H200 chips. Announced during summit Day 1; Nvidia previously reported 'zero percent' China market share.

decisions.title_en: Cerebras opens at $350 (+89%), closes $311.07 (+68%), raises $5.55B in 2026's biggest tech IPO
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-05-12 (pricing range upsize) and 2026-05-14 (final pricing/opening day). New today: actual final IPO price came in at $185/sh (above prior $150-160 range published yesterday), stock opened $350, intraday high $385, closed $311.07 (+68%), raised $5.55B (vs prior $4.8B estimate). First trading day numbers are substantively new information.

decisions.title_en: Trump-Xi summit Day 1: strategic framework agreement, AI governance protocol announced; Xi tells Musk, Cook 'China will open wider'
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-05-12 and 2026-05-13 about CEOs being invited / Jensen joining trip. New today: actual summit took place, 3-year 'constructive China-U.S. relationship of strategic stability' framework announced, Bessent confirmed AI governance protocol talks begin, Xi held separate meeting with US CEOs including Musk and Tim Cook saying China will open wider.

decisions.title_en: Musk v. Altman closing arguments delivered; jury deliberation Monday, damages phase begins concurrently
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-05-07 (trial start), 2026-05-12 (Altman testimony), 2026-05-13 (Musk testimony takeaways). New today: trial entered closing-argument phase, Molo accused OpenAI of breaching charitable trust, deliberations begin Monday, unusual damages phase running parallel to liability deliberation, Musk lawyer apologized for client's absence (China trip). This is a distinct trial milestone.

decisions.title_en: Cisco Q3 FY26: $5.3B YTD AI orders, FY guide raised to $9B, 4,000 layoffs, stock +15%
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Cisco reported $15.84B revenue (12% YoY), $5.3B YTD AI infrastructure orders, raised FY guide from $5B to $9B, cutting fewer than 4000 jobs (<5% of workforce). Stock soared 15% after-hours. Major signal of AI infrastructure demand reaching networking layer.

decisions.title_en: Gemini Omni video model leaks from Gemini app ahead of Google I/O 2026
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. UI strings appeared May 2, actual generated clips leaked May 11 from Gemini Pro users showing video remix, in-chat editing, voice coherence. Speculated as Veo 3.1 rebrand or first true unified Gemini omni-model. Within 5-day freshness window (4 days old). Google I/O keynote May 19.

decisions.title_en: Bartz v. Anthropic fairness hearing held May 14
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-05-14 with hearing details (91.3% claim rate, $3000/work minimum payout, hearing at 2 PM PT). The hearing took place but no judicial ruling has been issued or reported. No substantively new information today beyond what was published yesterday.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic in talks for $50B round at $950B valuation
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-05-08. Today's coverage (Sherwood News, TrendingTopics) is reporting the same $30-50B / $900-950B valuation talks first surfaced by NYT April 29. No new term sheet signed, no new investor names. Pure rehash.
